title: Reduce false-positive HIGH-risk human review flags
body:
## Summary
- **Decision engine**: HIGH risk tier now allows auto-approve when all agents pass clean (score <= threshold), instead of unconditionally forcing human review. Override checks (trust tier, blocked branches, dependencies) still apply as safety nets.
- **Triage — adds_api_endpoints**: Switched from substring matching to path-segment matching. Files like `ReleaseHandler.tsx` no longer falsely trigger the "new API endpoints" HIGH signal.
- **Triage — crosses_architecture_boundary**: Raised threshold from >1 to >2 distinct modules. Typical multi-folder UI changes no longer flag as architecture boundary crossings.

## Test plan
- [x] Existing decision engine tests updated and passing
- [x] New tests for HIGH tier clean auto-approve, HIGH tier with findings escalation
- [x] New tests for path-segment API endpoint detection (false positive + true positive)
- [x] New tests for architecture boundary threshold (2 modules = ok, 3 modules = flagged)
- [ ] Verify the specific TeamPlanner sort-fix PR would no longer be flagged as human review

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
